_comment: 역할별 MD 삽화 + 추가 UI 이미지. joseon_sageuk (조선 사극) 스타일 전용.

role_illustrations.prefix: Joseon dynasty Korean historical drama illustration, wide scene, traditional Korean ink wash painting influenced, muted earth tones with hanbok color accents, dramatic composition,
role_illustrations.suffix: , Korean traditional paper texture, elegant sageuk art style, masterpiece, best quality

rules_illustrations.prefix: Joseon dynasty Korean historical drama illustration, wide scene, traditional Korean ink wash painting influenced, muted earth tones with hanbok color accents, instructional diagram style,
rules_illustrations.suffix: , Korean traditional paper texture, elegant sageuk art style, masterpiece, best quality

ui_extra.prefix: Joseon dynasty Korean decorative design, dancheong ornamental pattern, traditional Korean painting aesthetic,
ui_extra.suffix: , Korean traditional design, gold and crimson accent, hanji paper texture, masterpiece

role_illustrations.description: 역할별 MD 삽화. 각 역할의 능력/전략/상황을 묘사하는 와이드 일러스트.

werewolf_hunt.caption: 동족 확인
werewolf_hunt.prompt: two sinister figures in dark dopo robes secretly exchanging glances across a moonlit Joseon village courtyard, paper lanterns flickering, other villagers in hanbok unaware, tension and conspiracy, night scene with silver moonlight, traditional Korean tiled rooftops

werewolf_lone.caption: 외로운 늑대
werewolf_lone.prompt: a lone cloaked figure peeking at face-down wooden name tablets on a low Korean table in a dark ondol room, candlelight from a traditional oil lamp revealing sinister eyes, solitary and calculating atmosphere, sliding paper doors

werewolf_accused.caption: 투표 재판
werewolf_accused.prompt: an accused figure kneeling before a Joseon magistrate in a gwana courtroom, angry villagers in hanbok pointing fingers, torches and dramatic shadows on wooden pillars, tension of a sagwa tribunal

seer_vision.caption: 예언 능력
seer_vision.prompt: a mystical shaman mudang gazing into a bronze mirror revealing a wolf silhouette, magical energy swirling, cosmic purple and blue glow around traditional Korean ritual items, revelation moment in a mountain shrine

seer_choice.caption: 선택의 순간
seer_choice.prompt: a hand in white hanbok sleeve hovering between two face-down wooden tablets and a single player tablet, decision moment, mystical energy from fingertips, strategic dilemma in a candlelit sarangchae room

seer_testimony.caption: 증언
seer_testimony.prompt: a robed fortune teller standing before seated Joseon officials sharing visions, gesturing dramatically in flowing dopo, some believing some doubting, daylight courtyard of a traditional Korean gwana

robber_swap.caption: 카드 교환
robber_swap.prompt: a masked bandit in black night clothes silently swapping two wooden name tablets under moonlight, nimble hands mid-exchange, sleeping Joseon village with tiled roofs background, stealth and precision

robber_identity.caption: 새 정체 확인
robber_identity.prompt: a thief looking at a stolen wooden tablet with shock and realization, the tablet glowing with wolf or village symbol, dramatic reveal moment in a dark storage room with rice sacks

robber_bluff.caption: 위장
robber_bluff.prompt: a figure in shadows removing their gat hat to reveal a different face beneath, identity crisis, duality of roles, bronze mirror reflection showing wolf, traditional Korean room

minion_devotion.caption: 충성의 맹세
minion_devotion.prompt: a hooded servant kneeling before wolf shadows on a hanji paper wall, thumbs up signal in darkness, secret allegiance ritual in a Joseon underground chamber, candlelit cellar with earthen jars

minion_sacrifice.caption: 희생 전략
minion_sacrifice.prompt: a figure in commoner hanbok deliberately drawing suspicion onto themselves while wolves hide in the crowd, martyrdom pose, Joseon village marketplace at dawn, wooden stalls

minion_deception.caption: 교란
minion_deception.prompt: a puppet master figure in dark robes secretly pulling silk strings that connect Joseon villagers, creating confusion and misdirection, web of lies visualization, traditional Korean courtyard

mason_bond.caption: 결사 확인
mason_bond.prompt: two scholar figures in dopo robes exchanging secret signals in a moonlit Confucian academy seowon, wooden pillars and calligraphy scrolls, trust and brotherhood, blue and gold candlelight

mason_alibi.caption: 알리바이
mason_alibi.prompt: two allies in scholar hats standing back to back in a Joseon court debate, defending each other, mutual trust shield visualization, daylight gwana scene with wooden railings

mason_suspicion.caption: 의심받는 결사
mason_suspicion.prompt: Joseon villagers in hanbok suspiciously watching two scholars who seem too coordinated, paranoid atmosphere in a traditional marketplace, whispers behind paper fans

troublemaker_chaos.caption: 혼란의 교환
troublemaker_chaos.prompt: a jester-like gwangdae figure juggling two glowing wooden tablets between two sleeping players in hanbok, chaotic magical sparks, mischievous grin, midnight chaos in a Joseon inn

troublemaker_confusion.caption: 아침의 혼란
troublemaker_confusion.prompt: Joseon villagers in hanbok arguing and pointing at each other in confusion at dawn in a courtyard, identity mix-up chaos, scattered wooden tablets, comedic pandemonium, traditional Korean architecture

troublemaker_reveal.caption: 진실 공개
troublemaker_reveal.prompt: the moment of revelation when swapped players discover their new roles, shock and disbelief expressions in hanbok, dramatic gasps in a Joseon gwana courtroom

tanner_despair.caption: 절망의 무두장이
tanner_despair.prompt: a weary leather tanner sitting alone in a dark Joseon workshop surrounded by hanging pelts, hollow hopeless eyes, traditional Korean tools and earthen floor, ochre and brown

tanner_provocation.caption: 도발
tanner_provocation.prompt: a tanner in rough hanbok deliberately acting suspicious in the Joseon village square, waving arms and making contradictory claims, wanting to be punished, wooden market stalls

tanner_victory.caption: 역설의 승리
tanner_victory.prompt: a ghostly tanner figure rising victorious from a shallow grave while confused wolves and villagers in hanbok watch in disbelief, ironic triumph, dark humor, Joseon cemetery with stone markers

drunk_stumble.caption: 무의식의 교환
drunk_stumble.prompt: a drunk yangban stumbling figure blindly swapping their tablet with a center pile tablet, dizzy stars, unable to see what they got, Joseon tavern joomak haziness, makgeolli bowls scattered

drunk_morning.caption: 아침의 혼란
drunk_morning.prompt: a hungover figure in disheveled hanbok at dawn trying to remember what happened last night, blurry vision, headache visualization, identity uncertainty, Joseon inn courtyard

drunk_accusation.caption: 억울한 누명
drunk_accusation.prompt: a confused drunk in hanbok being accused by Joseon villagers while genuinely not knowing their own role, hands up in bewilderment, gwana tribunal scene

hunter_revenge.caption: 최후의 복수
hunter_revenge.prompt: a fallen archer firing a traditional Korean bow at their accuser in their dying moment, dramatic final shot, vengeance and justice, sunset Joseon fortress wall battlefield

hunter_dilemma.caption: 투표의 딜레마
hunter_dilemma.prompt: a hunter in warrior garb carefully considering who to aim their bow at during a vote, weighing life and death decision, tense standoff in a Joseon courtyard

hunter_bluff.caption: 사냥꾼의 억지력
hunter_bluff.prompt: a hunter publicly displaying their traditional Korean bow as deterrent, nobody wants to vote for them, standoff atmosphere in Joseon village, power of threat

insomniac_watch.caption: 마지막 확인
insomniac_watch.prompt: a sleepless figure in sleeping hanbok peeking at their own tablet at the end of a long night, traditional oil lamp flickering, wide alert eyes discovering truth, ondol room with paper doors

insomniac_changed.caption: 바뀐 정체
insomniac_changed.prompt: an insomniac in hanbok seeing a different tablet than expected, shock and horror or relief, the tablet glowing with unexpected symbol, dramatic revelation in a dark Joseon bedroom

insomniac_testimony.caption: 확실한 증언
insomniac_testimony.prompt: an insomniac confidently testifying to Joseon officials about their unchanged or changed identity, certainty and conviction, daylight gwana courtyard scene with traditional architecture

doppelganger_mirror.caption: 복제의 순간
doppelganger_mirror.prompt: a figure in hanbok looking into a cracked bronze mirror seeing another person's reflection, identity theft moment, silver and purple shifting energy, metamorphosis in a traditional Korean dressing room

doppelganger_act.caption: 복제된 행동
doppelganger_act.prompt: a shapeshifter in hanbok performing another role's night action with a ghostly original figure overlaid, dual identity visualization, spectral effect, Joseon night scene

doppelganger_crisis.caption: 정체성 혼란
doppelganger_crisis.prompt: a figure with two overlapping faces struggling to maintain their facade during a Joseon court debate, identity crisis, cracking theatrical mask, traditional Korean courtroom

witch_potion.caption: 비약의 선택
witch_potion.prompt: a traditional Korean herbalist examining a glowing center tablet then deciding whether to swap it with a player tablet, bubbling clay pot with herbal smoke, strategic decision, green medicinal fumes, Joseon apothecary

witch_swap.caption: 운명의 교환
witch_swap.prompt: a witch figure in dark hanbok placing a cursed tablet next to a sleeping villager, dark magical transfer, sinister yet calculated move, moonlit ondol bedroom

witch_innocent.caption: 무고한 마녀
witch_innocent.prompt: a herbalist choosing not to swap any tablet, walking away from the medicine pot with clean hands, restraint and wisdom, dawn light entering through paper doors of a Joseon workshop

alpha_wolf_convert.caption: 새 늑대 생성
alpha_wolf_convert.prompt: a massive wolf-masked figure in dark dopo placing a wolf tablet next to an unsuspecting sleeping person in hanbok, dark conversion ritual, predatory shadows in a Joseon nobleman's chamber

alpha_wolf_throne.caption: 늑대 우두머리
alpha_wolf_throne.prompt: an alpha wolf figure on a carved wooden throne commanding lesser figures with glowing red eyes, pack hierarchy, dark fortress interior with Korean traditional lanterns, crimson and black

alpha_wolf_strategy.caption: 전략적 선택
alpha_wolf_strategy.prompt: a wolf figure in dark robes studying center tablets by moonlight in a Korean pavilion jeongja, calculating which tablet to use for conversion, strategic predator mind, chess-like baduk planning

mystic_wolf_peek.caption: 비밀 엿보기
mystic_wolf_peek.prompt: an ethereal wolf figure with a glowing third eye secretly viewing a player tablet, mystical vision, Korean talisman bujeok runes floating, knowledge is power, indigo aura, Joseon shrine

mystic_wolf_info.caption: 정보의 힘
mystic_wolf_info.prompt: a mystic wolf figure whispering intelligence to pack members during night in a Joseon back alley, shared vision between conspirators, strategic information network, paper lanterns

mystic_wolf_alibi.caption: 완벽한 알리바이
mystic_wolf_alibi.prompt: a wolf in nobleman hanbok disguise using stolen knowledge to craft perfect alibis in daylight debate at a Joseon court, confident deception, knowing smirk behind a paper fan

dream_wolf_sleep.caption: 잠든 위협
dream_wolf_sleep.prompt: a sleeping wolf figure dreaming of the hunt while other conspirators move around them, peaceful yet dangerous slumber in an ondol room, dreamlike mist, floating full moon through paper window

dream_wolf_vulnerability.caption: 노출 위험
dream_wolf_vulnerability.prompt: a sleeping wolf figure being investigated by a shaman with a bronze mirror, vulnerability of being seen without knowing, dramatic irony, Joseon bedroom with silk bedding

dream_wolf_waking.caption: 각성의 아침
dream_wolf_waking.prompt: a wolf figure waking up at dawn not knowing who their allies are, alone among Joseon villagers in hanbok, isolated conspirator, uncertain morning in a traditional Korean inn

apprentice_seer_study.caption: 수련생의 예언
apprentice_seer_study.prompt: a young apprentice shaman with a small bronze mirror shard peeking at one center tablet, limited but valuable vision, traditional Korean student robes, soft purple glow, mountain shrine

apprentice_seer_growth.caption: 성장
apprentice_seer_growth.prompt: an apprentice gaining confidence after seeing a center tablet, small victory smile, stepping into the light of knowledge, coming-of-age moment in a Joseon seowon academy

apprentice_seer_testimony.caption: 제한된 증언
apprentice_seer_testimony.prompt: an apprentice carefully sharing limited information with skeptical Joseon officials, nervous but truthful testimony, gwana courtyard with wooden pillars

paranormal_investigator_search.caption: 수사 개시
paranormal_investigator_search.prompt: a Joseon detective porado with a glowing magnifying lens examining player tablets one by one, spectral evidence floating, dark investigation room in a gwana office, ink and brushes

paranormal_investigator_convert.caption: 진영 전환
paranormal_investigator_convert.prompt: a detective looking at a wolf tablet and their eyes changing color to red, horrifying conversion moment, corruption spreading, traditional Korean official's room with scrolls

paranormal_investigator_stop.caption: 수사 중단
paranormal_investigator_stop.prompt: a detective deliberately putting down their lens after seeing one tablet, choosing not to look further, cautious wisdom, Joseon gwana office with calligraphy on walls

village_idiot_shift.caption: 전체 이동
village_idiot_shift.prompt: a gwangdae jester figure spinning all player tablets in a circle like a spinning top, arrows showing rotation direction, chaotic but systematic, Joseon village square

village_idiot_chaos.caption: 대혼란의 아침
village_idiot_chaos.prompt: all Joseon villagers in hanbok waking up confused as their positions shifted, everyone pointing in different directions, comedic mass confusion in a traditional courtyard

village_idiot_strategy.caption: 얼간이의 지혜
village_idiot_strategy.prompt: the village fool sitting quietly with a secret knowing smile while chaos erupts around them in a Joseon marketplace, hidden intelligence behind the mask of foolishness

revealer_expose.caption: 공개의 순간
revealer_expose.prompt: a righteous figure in white dopo dramatically flipping a player tablet face-up revealing a villager role, divine light beam, public revelation in a Joseon courtyard

revealer_cover.caption: 다시 덮기
revealer_cover.prompt: a revealer hastily covering a flipped tablet back up after seeing a wolf symbol, panic and quick thinking, protective instinct in a Joseon gwana setting

revealer_impact.caption: 공개의 파장
revealer_impact.prompt: Joseon villagers in hanbok reacting to a publicly revealed role tablet, some relieved some suspicious, ripple effect of information, gwana courtyard commotion

aura_seer_sense.caption: 기운 감지
aura_seer_sense.prompt: a meditating shaman figure with closed eyes sensing colorful ki energy trails left by night actors, energy threads connecting to moved tablets, rainbow detection in a Korean mountain shrine

aura_seer_map.caption: 행동 지도
aura_seer_map.prompt: an aura seer mentally mapping who acted and who stayed still during the night, constellation-like diagram floating in mind, traditional Korean astronomy chart style

aura_seer_deduction.caption: 추론
aura_seer_deduction.prompt: an aura seer presenting their findings to Joseon officials with glowing connection lines between suspects, analytical deduction scene in a gwana courtroom

prince_immunity.caption: 면역의 왕관
prince_immunity.prompt: a young prince figure with a golden gwanmo crown deflecting votes like a force field, immunity aura, regal defiance against the mob, untouchable in a Joseon royal court

prince_burden.caption: 왕관의 무게
prince_burden.prompt: a young Joseon prince bearing the heavy crown with the burden of survival while others fall, lonely at the top in an ornate palace chamber, bittersweet immunity

prince_suspicion.caption: 왕자의 의심
prince_suspicion.prompt: Joseon court officials suspiciously eyeing the prince who cannot be eliminated, questioning if royalty hides a dark secret, political tension in a palace throne room

cursed_transformation.caption: 저주의 발동
cursed_transformation.prompt: a normal villager in hanbok being viewed by a shaman and dark wolf marks suddenly appearing on their skin like cursed ink tattoos, unwilling transformation, traditional Korean talisman failing

cursed_unaware.caption: 무지의 저주
cursed_unaware.prompt: a cursed figure walking among Joseon villagers completely unaware of the dark mark on their back, dramatic irony, hidden danger in a traditional marketplace

cursed_reveal.caption: 진실의 순간
cursed_reveal.prompt: the shocking moment when a cursed villager is revealed to have become a wolf, village gasps in a Joseon courtyard, identity betrayal by fate, torn hanbok revealing wolf marks

apprentice_tanner_shadow.caption: 스승의 그림자
apprentice_tanner_shadow.prompt: a young apprentice following in the shadow of the tanner master, learning the trade of despair, dingy Joseon workshop with hanging leather, ochre and brown, earthen floor

apprentice_tanner_loyalty.caption: 충성의 대가
apprentice_tanner_loyalty.prompt: an apprentice celebrating when their master tanner is voted out, bittersweet shared victory, tears and relief in a Joseon gwana courtyard

apprentice_tanner_alone.caption: 홀로 남은 견습생
apprentice_tanner_alone.prompt: an apprentice tanner alone when the master is not in the game, lost and purposeless in an empty Joseon workshop, becoming a villager by default

thing_touch.caption: 존재의 터치
thing_touch.prompt: a mysterious shadowy hand reaching out to touch a neighbor's shoulder in the dark ondol room, subtle signal, eerie contact, goosebumps moment, paper doors casting shadows

thing_signal.caption: 신호의 의미
thing_signal.prompt: two neighbors in hanbok exchanging knowing glances after being touched in the night, silent communication, subtle alliance formation in a Joseon inn

thing_mystery.caption: 정체불명
thing_mystery.prompt: Joseon villagers debating about a mysterious presence they felt during the night, phantom touch, unsettling uncertainty, paranoid atmosphere in a traditional Korean village

squire_loyalty.caption: 기사의 충성
squire_loyalty.prompt: a young squire in dark warrior garb kneeling before wolf-masked masters, pledging loyalty in a dark Joseon underground chamber, crimson lanterns, secret ceremony

squire_shield.caption: 방패 역할
squire_shield.prompt: a squire stepping forward to take suspicion and protect the wolves, human shield strategy, selfless sacrifice in a Joseon court tribunal

squire_intelligence.caption: 정보 수집
squire_intelligence.prompt: a squire quietly observing wolf-masked figures during the night phase, memorizing faces and positions, intelligence gathering in a dark Joseon alley, shadowy observation

beholder_watch.caption: 주시의 눈
beholder_watch.prompt: multiple floating magical eyes watching over the seer from behind a traditional Korean folding screen byeongpung, protective surveillance, deep indigo guardian energy, all-seeing vigil

beholder_protect.caption: 예언자 보호
beholder_protect.prompt: a beholder subtly deflecting suspicion away from the seer during a Joseon court debate, quiet guardian behind a paper fan, strategic protection

beholder_confirm.caption: 확인의 가치
beholder_confirm.prompt: a beholder and seer exchanging a meaningful glance of mutual recognition during daylight in a Joseon courtyard, trust confirmed, subtle alliance, traditional architecture

ui_extra.description: 전체 게임 UI 이미지. ComfyUI 최소 512px 이상. joseon_sageuk 스타일 통일.

logo_title.prompt: Joseon dynasty wide panoramic title art, ornate traditional Korean calligraphy text ONE NIGHT in gold and crimson, wolf silhouette howling at full moon integrated into the lettering, pine tree and plum blossom decorations, dancheong pattern border, dark background, Korean ink wash painting style

expansion_base.prompt: Joseon dynasty dark village scene, full moon rising over traditional Korean hanok houses with wolf silhouettes on giwa tiled rooftops, stone path with paper lanterns, Korean ink wash composition, dancheong vine border, deep blue moonlight, hanji texture

expansion_daybreak.prompt: Joseon dynasty dramatic sunrise breaking over a Korean mountain landscape, first light revealing shadowy figures in hanbok, dawn colors piercing through storm clouds, Korean ink wash cloud composition, dancheong sunburst motifs, warm orange and cool purple, hanji texture

expansion_bonus1.prompt: Joseon dynasty mystical royal chamber in a Korean palace, golden gwanmo crown on silk cushion with cursed aura, magical starlight through traditional lattice window, Korean ink wash light composition, dancheong ornamental pillars, gold and deep purple, hanji texture

expansion_bonus2.prompt: Joseon dynasty shadowy armory in a Korean fortress, wolf banners with traditional Korean armor on display, mysterious glowing eyes in dark corners, Korean ink wash shadow composition, dancheong weapon motifs, dark steel blue and crimson, hanji texture

btn_play.prompt: Joseon dynasty wide cinematic banner, moonlit Korean village courtyard at midnight with glowing play arrow symbol in center, mountain mist, dancheong decorative border, dramatic call to action atmosphere, stars and pine trees, hanji texture

bg_m_home.prompt: Joseon dynasty vertical composition, lone wolf silhouette howling atop a traditional Korean fortress watchtower against an oversized full moon, plum blossom petals drifting upward, dark hanok rooftops stretching below, Korean ink wash mist layers, dancheong ornamental frame, deep midnight blue and silver, hanji texture

bg_m_setup.prompt: Joseon dynasty vertical composition, candlelit low Korean table viewed from above with scattered face-down wooden name tablets and a glowing map of a village, hands in hanbok sleeves reaching toward the center, Korean ink wash top-down perspective, dancheong circular border, warm amber and deep shadow, hanji texture

bg_m_join.prompt: Joseon dynasty vertical composition, a massive ornate wooden gate with iron studs slightly ajar with golden light spilling through the crack, a hand reaching for the iron door ring, stone path with fallen plum blossoms, Korean ink wash dramatic lighting, dancheong archway, deep brown and warm gold, hanji texture

bg_m_night.prompt: Joseon dynasty vertical composition, mysterious moonlit ondol bedroom with a sleeping figure in hanbok, ghostly translucent wolf shadow looming over, traditional Korean clock showing midnight, pine branches visible through paper window, Korean ink wash supernatural atmosphere, dancheong frame, deep indigo and pale moonlight silver, hanji texture

bg_m_day.prompt: Joseon dynasty vertical composition, sunlit Korean village courtyard with villagers in hanbok gathered in a tense circle pointing accusatory fingers, dramatic morning light casting long shadows, pine tree in center, Korean ink wash composition with radial focus, dancheong sunburst border, warm golden amber and soft rose, hanji texture

bg_m_vote.prompt: Joseon dynasty vertical composition, dramatic torchlit gwana tribunal scene, accused figure kneeling in a spotlight surrounded by officials and villagers holding voting stones, flames reflecting upward, Korean ink wash dramatic chiaroscuro, dancheong gothic arch frame, fiery orange and deep crimson shadow, hanji texture

bg_m_lobby.prompt: Joseon dynasty vertical composition, atmospheric waiting hall in a traditional Korean inn with cloaked figures seated along wooden benches in candlelight, weapons and role tokens displayed on a low table, lattice window above casting moonlight, Korean ink wash composition, dancheong pillar frame, warm amber and cool stone gray, hanji texture

rules_illustrations.description: 게임 규칙 페이지용 삽화 + 배너. 각 규칙 페이지 상단 배너 + 중간 삽화.

banner_game_overview.prompt: a grand panoramic view of a mysterious Joseon village at twilight, villagers in hanbok gathering in the courtyard around a large low table with face-down wooden tablets, full moon rising behind traditional Korean tiled rooftops, an air of mystery and anticipation

overview_factions.prompt: three distinct groups in hanbok facing each other in a triangular standoff, blue-lit villagers on the left, red-lit wolf-masked figures on the right, and a lone amber-lit tanner figure in the center, faction tension, Joseon courtyard

overview_appeal.prompt: a lively group of Joseon villagers around a low table laughing and pointing at each other with wooden tablets face-down, warm traditional inn joomak atmosphere, the joy of social deduction, oil lamps and camaraderie

banner_game_setup.prompt: a wide view of a low Korean table being prepared for the game, hands in hanbok sleeves dealing out face-down wooden tablets in a circle with three extra tablets placed in the center, traditional oil lamp glowing nearby, methodical ritual of game preparation

setup_cards.prompt: close-up of face-down wooden name tablets being arranged on a dark lacquered Korean table, player count plus three center tablets neatly aligned, each tablet with ornate wolf-and-moon carved back design, careful placement ritual

setup_app.prompt: a glowing phone screen displaying the narration app interface placed at the center of a traditional Korean game table, players in hanbok seated around watching the screen, technology meets ancient game, modern ritual in Joseon setting

banner_night_phase.prompt: a wide cinematic scene of sleeping Joseon villagers in hanbok with one figure secretly opening their eyes in the darkness of an ondol room, moonlight streaming through paper door, the critical moment when night actions begin, eerie silence

night_wake.prompt: a sequence showing different role figures in hanbok waking up one by one in order, each illuminated by their own colored aura, shaman in purple, bandit in red, trickster in orange, sequential night action, Joseon bedroom

night_action.prompt: hands in hanbok sleeves reaching across a dark lacquered table to peek at or swap face-down wooden tablets, dramatic close-up, fingers hovering over tablet edges, tense fingertip decisions, oil lamp light

banner_day_phase.prompt: a wide cinematic scene of heated Joseon village debate at dawn, villagers in hanbok standing in a circle arguing and pointing fingers at each other, golden sunrise light over hanok rooftops, dramatic accusations and defenses

day_debate.prompt: two Joseon figures in hanbok facing each other in an intense verbal duel, speech and question marks floating around, other villagers watching and judging, cross-examination moment in gwana courtyard

day_vote.prompt: all players in hanbok simultaneously pointing at their chosen target in a dramatic countdown moment, fingers frozen mid-point, the decisive voting instant, radial composition, Joseon courtyard

banner_victory.prompt: a dramatic split-screen scene, left side showing victorious sunrise with Joseon villagers in hanbok celebrating, right side showing dark moonlit wolf-masked figures howling in triumph, the duality of possible outcomes

victory_village.prompt: a wolf being unmasked and revealed to shocked Joseon villagers in hanbok, the moment of truth when the wolf tablet is flipped face-up, dramatic reveal with light burst in a gwana courtroom

victory_wolf.prompt: wolf-masked figures in nobleman hanbok sitting smugly among confused villagers as an innocent player is wrongly punished, dark satisfaction, Joseon tribunal, wolf team victory by misdirection

banner_special_rules.prompt: a wide mysterious scene of edge-case situations in Joseon setting, a bronze mirror reflecting a different face, a lone wolf peeking at center tablets, and tablets shifting positions, visual chaos of special rule interactions

special_doppelganger.prompt: a figure in hanbok looking into a bronze mirror and seeing a completely different role reflected back, with a timeline arrow showing when the copied action happens, doppelganger timing visualization, Joseon dressing room

special_no_wolf.prompt: three center wooden tablets face-down with wolf eyes peeking from two of them, all player positions empty of wolves, the rare no-werewolf scenario, question marks floating above confused Joseon villagers in hanbok

scenario_episodes.description: 시나리오별 대표 이미지 + 에피소드 배경. joseon_sageuk 스타일.

floodgate_nameplates.prompt: Joseon dynasty dark atmospheric panorama, a mysterious government office gwana at night beside a stone floodgate and reservoir, wooden name tablets hanging from iron chains dripping with water, wolf shadows lurking behind traditional Korean pillars, full moon reflecting on dark water, ominous atmosphere, Korean ink wash painting style, dancheong accents, hanji texture, masterpiece, best quality

floodgate_nameplates_ep1.prompt: Joseon dynasty night scene, a dim government office gwana interior with a magistrate's empty seat, scattered wet wooden name tablets on a low table illuminated by a single oil lamp, shadows of figures in hanbok creeping along paper doors, tense investigative atmosphere, Korean ink wash painting style, dancheong accents, deep indigo and amber, hanji texture, masterpiece, best quality

floodgate_nameplates_ep2.prompt: Joseon dynasty dramatic dawn scene, an amhaeng-eosa secret royal inspector arriving at a village gate on horseback, his mapae credential held high, villagers in hanbok gathering with nervous expressions, morning mist over traditional Korean rooftops, tension and revelation atmosphere, Korean ink wash painting style, dancheong accents, warm gold and cool blue, hanji texture, masterpiece, best quality

floodgate_nameplates_ep3.prompt: Joseon dynasty tense pre-dawn scene, a dark fortress courtyard lit by scattered torches, conspirators in dark dopo robes exchanging secret documents near a stone floodgate, a lone loyalist figure watching from the shadows of a watchtower, betrayal and intrigue atmosphere, Korean ink wash painting style, dancheong accents, crimson and deep shadow, hanji texture, masterpiece, best quality
